array.string: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "STATE_DIR=/Users/tamishra/.local/state/dlyprb-autopush-test RUN_WINDOW_HOURS=12 /Users/tamishra/Documents/dlyPrb/scripts/auto-push-dlyprb.sh >> /tmp/dlyprb-autopush.test.out.log 2>> /tmp/dlyprb-autopush.test.err.log"' ; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) /Users/tamishra/Library/LaunchAgents/com.tanmayrsm.dlyprb.autopush.test.plist >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
